ham: Dear student, this is a reminder that your borrowed book 'Introduction to Algorithms' is due on 30th April. Please return it to the library by EOD to avoid fines. Thanks, Library Admin.
spam: URGENT: Apke electricity bill ka payment pending hai. Agar 30th April se pehle payment nahi hua toh aapka connection 1st May ko disconnect ho jayega. Jaldi se <URL> par click karke payment kare. Warning: Late payment se 2000 Rs late fee lagegi. Thank you!
